code:
from typing import Optional
from fastapi import FastAPI, Query

app = FastAPI()

@app.get("/items/")
async def read_items(
    name: str = Query(..., min_length=2, max_length=10, description="Name of the item"),
    age: Optional[int] = Query(None, ge=0, le=120, description="Age of the item owner"),
    search: str = Query("default_search", regex="^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$", description="Search term (alphanumeric and underscore only)"),
    limit: int = Query(10, gt=0, description="Number of items to return"),
    offset: int = Query(0, ge=0, description="Offset for pagination")
):
    """
    Öğeleri sorgu parametreleriyle filtreler ve doğrular.
    """
    return {
        "name": name,
        "age": age,
        "search": search,
        "limit": limit,
        "offset": offset,
        "message": "Items filtered successfully!"
    }

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)
prompt: FastAPI ile query parameters validation yaz.
